summary: Tested optimized booking flow for Zont premium airport transfer service. All 12 test cases passed. The new flow (Homepage Search -> Car Selection -> Trip Recap -> Checkout) works correctly. Key verification: Clicking 'Select' on a vehicle navigates to /trip-recap instead of opening an auth modal (the main change to reduce bounce rates).
critical_code_review_comments: Google Maps APIs are showing deprecation warnings (Autocomplete, Marker, DirectionsService, DirectionsRenderer) - consider migrating to newer APIs in future
Canvas2D readback performance warnings - consider adding willReadFrequently attribute for better performance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Booking flow optimization tested. New flow: Homepage -> /car-selection -> /trip-recap -> /checkout. AuthModal removed from CarSelection. TripRecap is a new page showing route map, vehicle details, 6 premium perks, and mobile sticky CTA. Checkout has integrated passenger registration (signup/signin toggle) + Stripe payment on same page.

test_1_homepage_loads.details: Homepage loads correctly with search form (pickup, dropoff, date, time fields)

test_2_car_selection_page.details: Car selection page renders 4 vehicle cards with Select buttons, step 1 indicator active

test_3_select_navigates_to_trip_recap.details: Clicking 'Select' on a vehicle navigates to /trip-recap (NOT an auth modal) - KEY CHANGE VERIFIED

test_4_trip_recap_elements.details: Trip recap shows: route map (data-testid='trip-recap-map'), vehicle card (data-testid='recap-vehicle-card'), price block (data-testid='recap-price-block'), 6 premium perks (data-testid='perk-0' through 'perk-5'), Continue to Payment button (data-testid='trip-recap-continue-btn'), Change Vehicle back button (data-testid='trip-recap-back')

test_5_continue_to_payment.details: Clicking 'Continue to Payment' on trip-recap navigates to /checkout

test_6_checkout_passenger_details.details: Checkout page shows Passenger Details section with fields: firstName (data-testid='passenger-firstname'), lastName (data-testid='passenger-lastname'), email (data-testid='passenger-email'), phone, password (data-testid='passenger-password')

test_7_auth_mode_toggle.details: Toggle between 'signup' and 'signin' auth modes works correctly (data-testid='toggle-auth-mode')

test_8_stripe_card_element.details: Stripe CardElement is present in Payment section (data-testid='payment-section')

test_9_vehicle_summary_card.details: Vehicle summary card shows on left column with pickup (data-testid='checkout-pickup'), dropoff (data-testid='checkout-dropoff'), price (data-testid='checkout-price')

test_10_back_to_summary.details: 'Back to summary' link (data-testid='checkout-back') navigates back to /trip-recap

test_11_mobile_sticky_cta.details: Trip Recap has sticky bottom CTA bar on mobile viewport (390x844) with price and Continue to Payment button (data-testid='trip-recap-mobile-cta')

test_12_step_indicators.details: Step indicators show correctly: CarSelection shows step 1 active, TripRecap shows step 2 active, Checkout shows step 3 active

notes.external_api: C# API (api.zont.cab) provides vehicle pricing - working correctly
notes.google_maps: Google Maps API renders route map on trip-recap page - working correctly despite deprecation warnings
notes.stripe: Stripe CardElement loads correctly for payment
